description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Run tests that runs on push to the master branch and on pull requests targeting master. Use a matrix job strategy to run tests with Python 3.8, 3.12, and 3.13.0-rc.1 on ubuntu-22.04 and ubuntu-24.04. For each matrix combination, check out the code, set up the corresponding Python version, install test dependencies, check code style, install SWI-Prolog, and run tests with coverage.
